title: Memories of Murder
tmdbOverview: A sadistic serial rapist and murderer of young women terrorizes a small province in 1980s South Korea. To prevent further crimes, three increasingly desperate detectives with conflicting methods race against time to unravel the violent mind of the killer in a futile effort to solve the case.
synopsis: Released in 2003, Memories of Murder is a crime, drama and thriller film from South Korea. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a AL certification (BE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
